item.title: Screw the US.
item.description: The US doesn't deserve our hard earned money. The population of our country is 40 million. That's a lot of coin not going to the US LoL

item.title: Pixie & Brutus: Launch
item.description:
Today's Tiabeanie Tax; Curious bean wonders what she sees?
Oh, it's just Dad's pet Rock Sorry for the late post. The morning was not kind to me. Tomorrow I'll try to post nice and early

Might try this, but use a George Forman grill

item.dc:creator: AmandaHuff

item.title: It wasn't with flying colors but i did it
item.description: Panic disorder for 27 years now. Every time i had a panic attack, my world became smaller. The last time I went outside at al was 22 years ago. It's like you're in prison, but the door is wide open. For the past 10 months I been in heavy therapy with a psychiatrist, psychologists, social workers, animal assisted coaching, the whole lot. It is starting to pay of.
item.dc:creator: Spuddywuddy

item.title: Age of Excess Dump #12 - Memeflix and Chill
item.description:
(Disclaimer: I take no responsibility for the conditions of any of the crops, I just harvest them.)
Yes, yes. I know.
but...
"Lowrider, Scarlett. Scarlett? Lowrider."
I grew up with the 'bears. AND their cousins.
Not pictured: The ac unit from Hell. RIP Phil
"C'mere, Boogerlips!"
And you KNOW Goofy is flexible
Here we go again...
TWFTFEJN was/is the shit!
strt
Beautiful Oregon
I miss Smartsound
Shut up about the passage of time.
This is true of Doctor Who, as well.
Classic
...don't...
Miss Jane...
Probably reversed as well.
Yeah. For real.
Blow gently on your screen
I still have two old totes full of these guys.
Issac Hayes and Michael Bolton - 1990 Grammys for reference: https://i.imgur.com/6PlRXhI.gif
MmHmm.
Srsly tho.
item.dc:creator: LariCheltsy

item.title: ICM QUALITY MIX - Vol.73 COMING HOME

COVER ARTIST: Maximiliano Moretto
ICM SUGGESTED TRACK: [ ▶ & SCROLL] Mama, I'm Coming Home - Ozzy Osbourne YouTube: https://youtu.be/K0siYUjV9UM?si=Vn3-kewADct7VD9j Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/0S3gpZzlT9Hb7CCSV2owX7?si=1b4e9142902f49c2

Maojin Lee
Yanina Perez
Ryan Reos
Igor Sid
Boki
logicfun color
ast21
Victor Hugo
Chloe Veillard
Mintiger Jang Minho
Suggested Track Playlists: (HIT SHUFFLE) YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLoIzKPbKfwniKOaadw-tB8kaEQiUQ1Yp4 Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/6cqV52puia81vNnPHxcz1W?si=yoUknxpQQVql9E-NZRQ4 ICM SQUAD: @vazquezdaniel, @ohvalleyofplenty, @nichoDriver, @Dirgekins, @onewallpaperaweek, @thedownlowe, @TheForbiddenSemicolon, @bagoffishstix, @JayKillBam, @majkongskull, @DingoJ0nes, @HandsomePenguin, @MrJwinkyface, @Gorgoror, @ciadmillefailte, @kaeldra ICM TIP JAR: https://www.patreon.com/InterwebChexMix Please note that we do not claim ownership of any random art, comics, or photos featured in this collection; we only take credit for the daily effort that goes into compiling the collections themselves. Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos
item.dc:creator: MetaPathos

item.title: GovBrief Today - What Happened #179
item.description: Everything has a price tag now. Trump is selling off the country. Reproductive rights. Public lands. The safety net. All for sale. And now he's accepted a private jet from the Qatar government. It will cost taxpayers up to $1 billion to convert it into Air Force One. That money is being pulled directly from the Sentinel nuclear missile program. When he's done, the jet goes to the Trump Library. This is a straight-up heist. At the same time, he's tearing up decades of settled law. Federal employees can now preach at work, and even tell coworkers their religion is wrong. He started July with a bill to wreck Medicare and Medicaid. On Wednesday night, Sen. Bernie Sanders and Rep. Pramila Jayapal will show you what's happening and what you can do about it at a free livestream event. Don't rely on the algorithm to keep you informed. Let me send this to you every night, free and private, so that you always know what's going on. Add your email at govbrief dot today, on Facebook, or on Substack at Gov Brief Today. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com 1. https://go.govbrief.today/gaza-starvation-trump 2. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-promotes-scottish-course 3. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-shortens-russia-deadline 4. https://go.govbrief.today/court-planned-parenthood-funding 5. https://go.govbrief.today/kennedy-vaccine-comp-program 6. https://go.govbrief.today/everglades-internment-human-rights 7. https://go.govbrief.today/usda-sued-snap-data 8. https://go.govbrief.today/federal-employees-prostelytize 9. https://go.govbrief.today/defendant-questions-habba-authority 10. https://go.govbrief.today/maxwell-appeals-supreme-court 11. https://go.govbrief.today/judges-probe-deportation-quota 12. https://go.govbrief.today/texas-sues-ny-clerk 13. https://go.govbrief.today/bove-nomination-third-whistleblower 14. https://go.govbrief.today/harvard-may-settle-500m 15. https://go.govbrief.today/george-mason-investigation-broadened 16. https://go.govbrief.today/duke-university-investigation-opened 17. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-story-epstein-fallout 18. https://go.govbrief.today/qatari-gift-to-trump Yesterday's Most Read - https://go.govbrief.today/new-whistleblower-bove-nomination Fighting Back - https://go.govbrief.today/sanders-jayapal-webinar-wednesday Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: I give up
item.description: I had like six cute videos of me feeding the foster kittens their dinner tonight but I’ve been trying to post for forty five minutes and Imgur isn’t letting it happen. So if this doesn’t go through, I’m done for the night. I shall try to post tomorrow.
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.title: There's a reason Trump is calling for "real sugar" in soft drinks
item.description: Fanjul, seen pictured above, is also listed on Jeffrey Epstein's flight logs. José Fanjul wiki: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jos%C3%A9_Fanjul?wprov=sfla1

item.title: No
item.description: Most viral edit: Thanks for the award and upvotes, my dudes! Added the link for the Bluesky post and fixed a couple of errors. https://bsky.app/profile/ign.com/post/3lv2qrxv5nt2x Original post: I accidentally posted a meme today that was AI generated, I wasn’t paying close attention. It’s getting harder (at least for someone like me with bad eyes and ADHD) to tell the difference, and I hate it.
item.dc:creator: DownvotesStarWars
